title: ixeridium dentatum subsp. shiranense
intro: Ixeridium dentatum subsp. shiranense, also known as the Shan Ixeris, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the daisy family, native to China. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, due to the presence of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Ixeridium dentatum subsp. shiranense include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antimicrobial activities, making it a valuable herbal remedy. Traditionally, the plant is used in herbal preparations, such as teas and infusions, to treat various health conditions, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
